slot_description: The element that opens the modal when activated; receives aria-haspopup and aria-controls
Full-screen backdrop rendered behind modal content; clicking it closes the dialog
The modal container; receives role=dialog aria-modal aria-labelledby and focus trap
Visual header region grouping Title and optional Close button
Primary heading that labels the dialog; referenced by aria-labelledby on Content
Secondary descriptive text referenced by aria-describedby on Content
Action area at the bottom of the modal containing confirmation or cancel buttons
Icon button that dismisses the modal; requires accessible aria-label
Outermost wrapper that owns state and coordinates List and Panel relationships
Container for Tab buttons; receives role=tablist and aria-orientation
Individual tab button; receives role=tab aria-selected and aria-controls pointing to its Panel
Content region associated with a Tab; receives role=tabpanel aria-labelledby and tabindex=0
Outermost wrapper managing expanded state and allowMultiple behaviour
Single accordion entry grouping one Trigger and one Content section
Clickable header that toggles the associated Content; receives aria-expanded and aria-controls
Collapsible body region; receives aria-hidden when collapsed and is referenced by Trigger via aria-controls
Decorative chevron indicating open/closed state; hidden from assistive technology with aria-hidden=true
Outermost wrapper managing open state and keyboard navigation for the menu
Element that opens the Menu; receives aria-haspopup=menu aria-expanded and aria-controls
Popup list of interactive items; receives role=menu and is positioned relative to Trigger
Individual action; receives role=menuitem and handles keyboard activation
Visual divider between groups of Items; receives role=separator
Non-interactive descriptive label for a Group; receives aria-hidden=true or role=presentation
Logical grouping of related Items; receives role=group and aria-labelledby pointing to its Label
Outermost card wrapper providing a semantic content landmark
Top section of the card typically containing Media or an icon
Primary heading identifying the card content; level should reflect document hierarchy
Supporting text expanding on the Title
Main body area for arbitrary card content
Bottom section for actions or supplementary metadata
Image or illustration slot; img inside must have descriptive alt text
Outermost wrapper; receives role=alert for error/warning or role=status for success/info
Decorative status icon reinforcing severity; hidden from assistive technology with aria-hidden=true
Short bold summary of the alert message
Expanded details following the Title
Inline action area for links or buttons related to the alert
Dismiss button for dismissible alerts; requires aria-label describing the action
Outermost wrapper managing hover and focus show/hide state
Element that receives focus and mouse events; wraps the target widget and links it via aria-describedby
The visible tooltip bubble; receives role=tooltip and a stable id referenced by Trigger's aria-describedby
Decorative directional pointer; hidden from assistive technology with aria-hidden=true
Outermost field wrapper grouping all sub-elements for layout and spacing
Visible text label; associated with Field via htmlFor/id pairing
The actual form control; receives id type aria-invalid aria-describedby and aria-required
Supplementary hint below the field; referenced by Field via aria-describedby when no error is present
Validation error text; referenced by Field via aria-describedby and Field receives aria-invalid=true when visible
Decorative or functional icon inside the field boundary; decorative instances use aria-hidden=true
